settings.text: Exchanges, and refunds can be made for unworn and unwashed clothing  within a week after you've received the item. Any items that are sent back for exchange must be in good resell-able condition, (smoke free, unworn, no stains, etc.). Otherwise the product will be shipped back to the customer at the customer's expense.
Any exchange or refund items must be sent to (PO box number)

For any assistance of any order please email us at migliorecustomersapport@gmail.comPlease make sure to include all relevant information like your order number, item name, size and color so we can better assist you.
